description_long: This object consists of three distinct teapots arranged side by side, each with unique shapes and finishes. The leftmost teapot is squat and angular with a matte light gray surface and a rectangular handle, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The central teapot is taller, with a classic, bulbous body in a warm terracotta color, featuring a curved spout and an ornate, arched handle, topped with a rounded lid and knob. The rightmost teapot is low and wide, finished in matte black, with a gently domed lid and a simple, arching handle that attaches at the sides. All three teapots have visible spouts and handles, and their lids are distinct in shape and fit. The surfaces are generally matte or slightly rough, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments. These teapots are likely made from ceramic or cast iron, suitable for both functional and decorative use in urban domestic settings.
description: A group of three visually distinct teapots in gray, terracotta, and black, each with unique handles, spouts, and lids, featuring matte or slightly rough finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three teapots side by side, highlighting their different shapes, handles, and spouts.
description_view_1: Rear view focused on the central terracotta teapot, with the black and gray teapots partially obscured behind.
description_view_2: Front view from the opposite side, with the black teapot now on the left, terracotta in the center, and gray on the right.
description_view_3: Rear view centered on the gray teapot, with the terracotta and black teapots partially visible behind.
attribute_spout_orientation: Each teapot has a spout projecting outward from the main body, with the central teapot's spout elegantly curved and angled slightly upward at the front, while the side teapots have shorter, straight spouts positioned at the front.
attribute_handle_design: The left teapot has a rectangular, angular handle attached at the top; the central teapot features a thick, ornate, arched handle attached at the upper body; the right teapot has a simple, rounded arch handle attached at the sides.
attribute_lid_presence: All three teapots have lids; the central lid is domed with a knob, the left is flat and recessed, and the right is gently domed.
